videos.description: Word on the street is that come this July playtime is over, because The House Party is BACK!  Pull up with ME this July to Charlotte for the St. Louis Cyclones All-Star Weekend by Author Alexandria House! 🏀 If you didn’t go to the Homecoming Experience in 2023, this is a Black Romance Literary event you do not want to miss! Author Alexandria House brings her books to life with every detail. This experiential weekend is full of celebrating Black Romance authors, Cyclones activations, good food, and great vibes! From an exclusive WAGS Pre-Game Mixer for the VIPs to a WAGS Brunch, you never know who is going to pop out and show out! 😉 The girls that get it get it because the VIP Tickets are officially SOLD OUT! So go ahead and grab your weekend pass now! Trust me, this is an experience you don’t want to miss. IYKYK.  So go ahead and get your tickets today, I made it super easy by adding the link in my bio 😘 #hehousepartyexperience #bookevents #thingstodoincharlotte #summeroutside
